article.title: Seth Troxler: A Rising Figure in Techno
article.subtitle: Detroit Roots and Berlin Influence Shape a Distinctive Sound
article.author: A. Stern
article.excerpt: Seth Troxler, at 22, has already made significant inroads in the techno scene with a sound deeply influenced by his Detroit roots and his recent relocation to Berlin.

content.text: Seth Troxler has quickly established himself as a notable figure in the techno scene despite his young age. His Detroit roots are evident in his sound, and his recent move to Berlin has further solidified his presence within the European techno community.

Troxler's musical style is characterized by a distinctive blend of techno and minimal elements. His work often incorporates unconventional influences, such as the sounds of nature and space, which contribute to a unique sonic palette.
He has released music on respected labels including Spectral, Wagon Repair, and M_NUS. These releases have garnered attention and helped define his approach to production and performance.

Notable releases from Troxler include albums such as This Is Then, DJ-Kicks, Mixmag Presents Seth Troxler: The Illusion Nouveau, Mixmag Presents Jamie Jones vs. Seth Troxler, and Love Never Sleeps. These works showcase his evolving sound and production techniques.
Troxler's achievements and recognition within the techno scene highlight his potential for continued growth and influence in the years to come.
